name: Hazelnut and Anisette Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon instant espresso powder or instant coffee powder
½ cup chilled unsalted butter, cut into ½-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour two cookie sheets.
3. Mix the first six ingredients in a food processor.
4. Add butter and cut into the mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
5. Add nuts and sugar, chopping nuts coarsely using on/off turns. Transfer to a large bowl.
6. Mix eggs and anisette in a small bowl.
7. Add to dry ingredients and mix until dough forms.
8. Divide dough into three pieces. Gently knead each piece to bind.
9. Form each into 1½-inch-wide logs. Transfer to prepared sheets.
10. Bake until golden brown and firm to touch, about 35 minutes.
11. Cool in pans on racks for 15 minutes.
12. Using a serrated knife, cut logs into ¾-inch thick slices.
13. Arrange cut side up on cookie sheets. Bake until golden brown, about 15 minutes per side.
14. Cool on a rack. Store in an airtight container.
